title: Random small test improvements
body:
`make validate`, and tests, fail fairly spectacularly on macOS.

These are a few tiny improvements to that, not really getting us any closer to the tests working in any meaningful sense: two small build machinery cleanups, and some `gometalinter`-reported errors that were easy to fix and for some reason (?) invisible to Travis CI.

See individual commit messages for a bit more detail.
